---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: 'ccere'

---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

### Describe the solution you'd like
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

### Describe alternatives you've considered
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

### Additional context
<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->

### Use case scenarios
<!-- Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful. -->

### Priority level
<!-- How important is this feature for you? -->

- [ ] Critical (essential for basic functionality)
- [ ] High (significantly improves workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or minor improvement)

### Implementation complexity
<!-- Your assessment of how complex this feature might be to implement. -->

- [ ] Simple (minor UI changes)
- [ ] Moderate (new component or integration)
- [ ] Complex (major architectural changes)
- [ ] Very complex (requires significant refactoring)

### Related features
<!-- Are there any existing features that this would enhance or replace? -->

### Mockups or wireframes
<!-- If you have any design ideas, please share them. -->

### Technical considerations
<!-- Any technical details or constraints to consider. -->

## 📋 Checklist

Before submitting, please ensure you have:

- [ ] Described the feature clearly
- [ ] Explained the use case
- [ ] Considered alternatives
- [ ] Assessed priority and complexity
- [ ] Searched for duplicate requests
- [ ] Provided additional context

## 🔍 Similar Features

**Existing Features to Check:**

- Bible navigation and projection
- Song lyrics management
- Lower third overlays
- OBS Studio integration
- Settings and configuration
- Theme management
- Real-time updates

**Integration Points:**

- Frontend components
- Backend API endpoints
- OBS WebSocket integration
- Database/storage
- User interface
- Performance optimization

**Thank you for helping improve DXPR!** 🚀✨
